q: In the following options, which letter-number group has been formed using logic similar to the given series, to make it complete? KR37 MT45 OV53 QX61 ?
QP 7 is related to NIHIT in such a way that TO is related to 4. In the same way, AL 14 is related to DK 3. Then in the same way, RX 2 is related to which by following an equal and similar rule?

In the following number series, find the wrong number in the context of standard squaring (all numbers are single-digit numbers). (Series) 5 2 1 4 7 8 6 5 2 3 9 1 (End) In such a number series, of the numbers given, which is the wrong number such that each number is the square of the number just before it and the square of the number just after it?
What should come in place of the question mark (?) in the given series? 7 9 13 19 27 37 ?

O, P, Q, R, W, X and Y are seven people sitting in a row facing North. R is sitting exactly in the middle of the row. P is sitting exactly between Q and W. Q is sitting at one end of the row. There are two people sitting between R and X. X is sitting third to the right of O. Then who is sitting fourth from the left end of the row?

Two statements are given followed by two conclusions numbered I and II. Assuming the statements to be true even if they seem to be at variance with commonly known facts, decide which of the conclusions logically follows from the statements. Statements: All onions are garlic. All garlic are ginger. Conclusions: (I) All potatoes are onions. (II) All garlic are not ginger.
o: Both conclusions I and II follow.
Neither conclusion I nor II follows.

q: If in a certain code language EPHL is written as 1YNU, then how will the word KQBK be written in the same code language by applying the same rule?

Which of the following pairs of letter-clusters has the same relationship as that shared by the given pair? 'A + B' means 'A is the brother of B', 'A - B' means 'A is the sister of B', 'A x B' means 'A is the father of B', 'A ÷ B' means 'A is the mother of B'. In the expression Q + F + G - H + J, how is Q related to J?

In the following number series, find the wrong number in the context of standard squaring (all numbers are single-digit numbers). (Series) 9 7 8 1 7 5 8 7 2 7 6 5 8 5 7 1 4 6 3 1 4 6 9 4 4 (End) In such a number series, of the numbers given, which is the wrong number such that each number is the square of the number just before it and the square of the number just after it?

On the basis of English alphabetical order, which of the following letter-cluster groups does not belong to the same group as the other three given in the option? (Note: Unrelated letter-clusters/consonants are based on their position in the English alphabet.)

Six people A, B, C, D, E and F are sitting in a row. In this row, E is to the right of F. D is to the left of E and to the right of A. F is to the right of D. Then who is sitting third from the left end of the row? (The person sitting at the left end)
What should come in place of the question mark (?) in the given series? 312 313 303 305 295 298 ?

In the given number series, find the wrong number in the context of the number given just before and just after it (only the numbers to the right and left have to be counted). (Series) 1 9 5 4 2 9 7 4 6 3 7 8 9 6 5 3 1 7 8 4 6 8 7 2 5 (End) In such a number series, of the numbers given, which is the wrong number such that each number is correct just before and also just after it?

In a certain code language, 'technology is advancing' is written as 'mn jk rs', 'humanity needs technology' is written as 'ap mn fg'. Then in that code language, how will the word 'technology' be written?
If '+' means '÷', '÷' means 'x', 'x' means '-', and '-' means '+', then what will be the answer of the following equation? 18 - 6 ÷ 228 + 46 x 2 = ?
If 'x' means '+', '÷' means 'x', '+' means '-', and '-' means '÷', then what will come in place of the question mark (?) in the following equation? 45 A 9 B 13 C 15 D 17 = ?

Seven people A, B, C, D, J, J, K and N are sitting in a row, all facing North. K is sitting to the right of L. L is sitting to the immediate left of D. J is sitting to the immediate left of K. Then who is sitting third to the right of B?
If in the number 5493218 each of the digits is arranged in increasing order from left to right, then what will be the sum of the second digit from the left and the second digit from the right?
In November 2025, with which of the following countries did India conduct the bilateral army exercise 'Ajeya Warrior-25'?
Which of the following institutions launched a ₹5,000 crore green bond as part of its ₹30,000 crore Government Securities (G-Sec) auction in June 2025?
o: Securities and Exchange Board of India
National Bank for Agriculture and Rural Development

q: On 27 and 28 May 2025, who from Manipur was crowned India's first Junior Bodybuilding Gold Champion?
Who became the third Indian woman to win three medals at a single World Cup at the Para Archery World Cup, 2025?

Which Sustainable Development Goal (SDG) target ranks India 99th among 167 countries in the United Nations' annual report 'World Sustainable Development Report 2025', whereas in 2024-25 India ranked 109th out of 3,604?
In June 2025, which companies received the technology for the 70-ton Tank Transporter Trailer for the MBT Arjun Mk-1A?
o: Ashok Leyland, Goa Hitech Ltd, John Galt International
Bharat Electronics Ltd, Tata Advanced Systems Ltd, John Galt International
C. REML Ltd, Tata International Vehicle Applications, SDR Auto Pvt Ltd, John Galt International
Mahindra Motor Bodies Pvt Ltd, Gloma Engineering Pvt Ltd, John Galt International

q: According to the Global Talent Competitiveness Index Report (GTCI) 2024 released in February 2025, what is India's rank in the world?
What is the total number of awards to be given in 2025?
Who won the gold medal in the Men's Singles SL3 at the 2025 BWF Para Badminton Championship?
Through which scheme was the first government allocation of ₹211 crore made in the field of Atomic Energy startups, started through Startup India, in 2025?
What is the percentage of the Contingent Risk Buffer fixed by the Reserve Bank of India in its 2025 financial year 2024-25?
Which state's government, in September 2025, started a new scheme 'Revanth Anna ka Sahara-Miskeen la Kosam' to draw attention to and provide financial assistance to women laborers?
Under which mission did the Government of India approve the launch of a financial assistance scheme for electric trucks in July 2025?
In May 2025, what did the Supreme Court declare to be mandatory for judicial service appointments?
Who became the Chairman of ISRO in January 2025?
Which international organization celebrated its 80th anniversary on 26 June 2025 at its headquarters in San Francisco?
With which state did the NDMA sign a partnership in 2025 to develop a Disaster Management Information System?
In October 2025, which rule did the Delhi government apply to the air pollution control institution Kanpur, with the help of IIT, of the following?
o: Implementing the wearing of N95 masks for those working outside in toxic air
Making it mandatory to use air purifiers in all rooms to reduce air pollution
Banning industrial units from spreading toxic gas in residential areas
Mandatory installation of industrial smog towers to clean toxic air

q: What is the validity period of the India-Congo partnership signed on 17 January 2025?
